case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. PRUDENCIO SALINAS CRUZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, PRUDENCIO SALINAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-21-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED SEP-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, PRUDENCIO SALINAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION DEPT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, PRUDENCIO SALINAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.
